pages.notes: This is an index page mapping diary page numbers to places visited. Entry 'P.2' has 'Dis/an' which may be a trip name or location, followed by year 1993. Entry 11 has a word before Lugano that could be 'Luigi' or similar. Entry 31 ends with '1994' annotation. Entry 55 has what appears to be '1995' annotation. Several entries have partially legible place names. 'Aviona' may be 'Avione' or similar. 'Vernazza' reading is uncertain. Entries 21 and lower-left corner have some partially legible lines.
